name: Strategic Super Reserve
description: What is Strategic Super Reserve about? The Strategic Super Reserve ($SSR), by EnigmaFund VC, is a community-centric series of multichain DTFs (Decentralized Token Funds) and utilities designed to restore liquidity and attention to the best builders, projects and communities. EnigmaFund were part of the OG $TOSHI CTO team that ran Toshi from $1M-$950M and became the first native base meme listed on Coinbase. Our founder Enigma also serves on the advisory boards of projects such as Perle, Kino, AltCoinist, Mr Miggles, Movement Labs. What makes Strategic Super Reserve unique? SSR has already launched the Solana and Base DTFs investing hundreds of thousands of dollars in the best projects onchain. Recently we launched our first ground-breaking revenue generating privacy protocol MultiHopper, and have been channeling revenue to buy the SSR supply regularly. The SSR token is also entitled to receive up to 50% of buybacks funded by revenues generated from these DTFs and utilities.
